title: THE MODERN APPROACHES FOR THE ASSESSMENT OF FETAL WELL-BEING
author: Lakhno, I. V.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fetal growth restriction is known as an intrauterine pathological condition that is associated with some diseases in a further lifetime. Fetal distress is a satellite of fetal growth restriction. Timely and true diagnosing of fetal distress is still an issue in perinatology. This case study showed that non-invasive fetal electrocardiography could contribute to better diagnosing of fetal distress. The variables of beat-to-beat variations, fetal heart rate variability and fetal autonomic brain age score should be investigated as the biophysical markers of fetal deterioration.
